mapper.select: SELECT ac.CodeID AS codeId, ac.AuthCode AS authCode, e.Name AS name, e.Position AS position, e.Department AS department, e.Role AS role, ac.Status AS status, ac.UsedBy AS usedBy, ac.UsedAt AS usedAt FROM auth_codes ac LEFT JOIN employees e ON ac.UsedBy = e.EmployeeID order by UsedAt DESC

SELECT ac.CodeID AS codeId, ac.AuthCode AS authCode, e.Name AS name, e.Position AS position, e.Department AS department, e.Role AS role, ac.Status AS status, ac.UsedBy AS usedBy, ac.UsedAt AS usedAt FROM auth_codes ac LEFT JOIN employees e ON ac.UsedBy = e.EmployeeID where CodeID = #{codeId}
